verdict.criterion: elevated iff window mean z > 3x SEM AND > 0.5 sigma at early/mid cuts; STORY_A = elevated here while E4 anti-word evoked z ~= 0.05 sigma (displacement); STORY_B = floor here too (persona never writes the injected-vector direction)

provenance.arm: gauge:evoked (state_trajectory): compose_gauge_system context + GAUGE_PROBE user msg
provenance.null: neutral gauge records' own-minus-other per cut (same shard), e4-scorer math otherwise
provenance.fidelity_caveat: gauge streams are RE-TOKENIZED texts (tok(text, add_special_tokens=False)); token boundaries may differ from the originally sampled ones
provenance.reference: e4_trajectory_verdict.json: evoked-under-anti-word z ~= 0.05 sigma (1.5B), 0.08 sigma (7B); injected ~= 12 sigma
